name: Well-Child Visit Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for well-child visits and preventive medicine services for children (ages 0-17). Used in well-child visit measures (W15, W34) and as qualifying encounters for pediatric screening measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, infant (age younger than 1 year)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, early childhood (age 1-4 years)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, late childhood (age 5-11 years)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, adolescent (age 12-17 years)
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, infant (age younger than 1 year)
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, early childhood (age 1-4 years)
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, late childhood (age 5-11 years)
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, adolescent (age 12-17 years)
Initial care, per day, for evaluation and management of normal newborn infant
Annual wellness visit; includes a health risk assessment, first visit
Annual wellness visit; includes a health risk assessment, subsequent visit
Initial hospital or birthing center care, per day, for evaluation and management of normal newborn infant
